name: Giant Badger
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name": "Keen Smell", "desc": "The badger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell."}]

### Actions
[{"name": "Multiattack", "desc": "The badger makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws."}, {"name": "Bite", "desc": "Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage."}, {"name": "Claws", "desc": "Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) slashing damage."}]
